tasks.label: Build (editable install)
tasks.detail: Install package in editable mode (builds Cython extensions)

tasks.label: Build extensions in-place
tasks.detail: Build .so files into src/ for faster iteration

tasks.label: Run codegen
tasks.detail: Regenerate retcodetypes and exceptions from errordefns.txt (RDM installation)

tasks.label: Clean build artifacts
tasks.command: rm -rf build/ dist/ src/raimadb.egg-info/ src/rdm/*.so src/rdm/*.cpp
tasks.detail: Remove all build outputs (does not remove generated .pyx/.pxd)
